name: io.github.eclipse-cj/paper-distill-mcp
title: Paper Distill MCP
description: Academic paper search across 11 sources with AI curation, ranked push, Zotero and Obsidian support.

environmentVariables.name: OPENALEX_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email for OpenAlex polite pool (higher rate limits) and Unpaywall queries

environmentVariables.name: CORE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: CORE API key for enhanced open-access paper retrieval (free at core.ac.uk)

environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Telegram bot token for paper delivery

environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Telegram chat ID for paper delivery

environmentVariables.name: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Discord webhook URL for paper delivery

environmentVariables.name: ZOTERO_LIBRARY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Zotero user ID for saving papers to your library

environmentVariables.name: ZOTERO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Zotero API key for saving papers to your library
